title: knautia arvensis subsp. numidica
intro: Knautia arvensis subsp. numidica, also known as the Numidian knawel, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the family Caprifoliaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and relieve pain. The health benefits of Knautia arvensis subsp. numidica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Knautia arvensis subsp. numidica can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
